data_science.title: Regime-Conditioned Evaluation in Multi-Context Bayesian Optimization
data_science.why_trending: Addresses critical methodological gap in transfer Bayesian optimization by showing that regime-conditioned evaluation reverses algorithm rankings based on budget, directly challenging standard transfer-BO benchmarking practices.

data_science.title: Rethinking Local Learning: A Cheaper and Faster Recipe for LLM Post-Training
data_science.why_trending: Proposes LoPT for efficient LLM post-training by decoupling task adaptation from full-depth activation storage, offering substantial computational savings over standard end-to-end approaches.

data_science.title: When Does Gene Regulatory Network Inference Break? A Controlled Diagnostic Study of Causal and Correlational Methods on Single-Cell Data
data_science.why_trending: Provides controlled diagnostic methodology for GRN inference, systematically uncovering why causal methods fail relative to correlation baselines on single-cell data through controlled pathology studies.

data_science.title: Breaking the Quality-Privacy Tradeoff in Tabular Data Generation via In-Context Learning
data_science.why_trending: Breaks quality-privacy tradeoff in tabular data synthesis through in-context learning, addressing the memorization problem that limits small-sample generative modeling.

data_science.title: Training-Time Batch Normalization Reshapes Local Partition Geometry in Piecewise-Affine Networks
data_science.why_trending: Reveals how batch normalization reshapes local partition geometry in piecewise-affine networks, providing theoretical insights into training-time BN effects beyond optimization.

finance.title: ESG as Priced Crash Insurance: State-Dependent Tail Risk and Deconfounding Evidence
finance.why_trending: Establishes ESG as state-dependent crash insurance using double machine learning for deconfounding, reconciling the ESG alpha puzzle with tail-risk resilience during systemic drawdowns.

finance.title: Structural Limits of OHLCV-Based Intraday Signals in MNQ Futures: A Systematic Falsification Study
finance.why_trending: Comprehensive falsification study of OHLCV-based intraday signals across 15 strategy families on MNQ futures, systematically demonstrating the absence of exploitable trading edges under realistic constraints.

finance.title: Scaling Limits of Bivariate Nearly-Unstable Hawkes Processes and Applications to Rough Volatility
finance.why_trending: Extends multivariate nearly-unstable Hawkes processes with heterogeneous rough exponents, providing functional limit theorems for coupled stochastic systems relevant to rough volatility modeling.

finance.title: Large-Scale Asset Selection via Metric Dependence with Enriched High Frequency Information
finance.why_trending: Proposes Metric Dependence Screening for large-scale asset selection using high-frequency object-valued data, incorporating intraday risk dynamics beyond traditional low-dimensional summaries.

finance.title: Single-Period Portfolio Selection via Information Projection
finance.why_trending: Decomposes portfolio selection under CRRA utility into interpretable information-theoretic components (Rényi divergence and entropy), providing new theoretical lens on risk-aversion coefficients.

social_sciences.title: The Demand Externality of Automation
social_sciences.why_trending: Models automation's demand externality through heterogeneous-agent general equilibrium, reconciling productivity gains with income reallocation in closed-form using HJB-KFE framework.

social_sciences.title: Scalable Structural Estimation of Networked Infrastructure: Exact Decomposition for Localized Coordination
social_sciences.why_trending: Develops block-diagonal decomposition for structural estimation of networked infrastructure, enabling scalable estimation of high-dimensional dynamic programs through exact localized coordination.

social_sciences.title: MSE-Optimal Difference-in-Differences Estimator
social_sciences.why_trending: Proposes MSE-optimal pre-trend selection for difference-in-differences, addressing bias-variance tradeoff without pre-testing and improving validity under moderate sample sizes.

social_sciences.title: Did US Worker Retraining Reduce Participant Automation Exposure?
social_sciences.why_trending: Evaluates US WIOA retraining program across 23M participants using novel Retrainability Index, revealing limited shifts to automation-resilient work despite significant participation.

social_sciences.title: Design-Based Variance Estimation for Modern Heterogeneity-Robust Difference-in-Differences Estimators
social_sciences.why_trending: Extends modern heterogeneity-robust DiD estimators to complex survey designs, showing design-consistency under stratified-cluster sampling—critical for applied policy evaluation.

topics.name: Large Language Models & Efficient Training
topics.summary: Papers addressing computational efficiency and novel training paradigms for LLMs, from local-learning post-training to neural architecture generation via code diffs and outcome-level RL for compositional generalization.

topics.name: Causal Inference & Econometric Methods
topics.summary: Papers developing improved causal identification strategies and econometric estimators for controlled experiments and observational data, including GRN inference diagnostics, DiD refinements, and misspecification-robust GMM.

topics.name: Machine Learning for Finance & Portfolio Optimization
topics.summary: Papers applying ML and information-theoretic methods to portfolio construction, asset selection, and trading, including ESG risk management, high-frequency feature engineering, and DRL-based multi-asset optimization.

topics.name: High-Frequency Trading & Market Microstructure
topics.summary: Empirical and theoretical studies of intraday trading signals, informed trading detection, and decentralized finance mechanisms, revealing limits of simple technical indicators and information leakage in prediction markets.

topics.name: Stochastic Modeling & Mathematical Finance
topics.summary: Advances in stochastic process theory, volatility modeling, and option pricing, covering rough Hawkes processes, Volterra models with jumps, Bachelier approximations, and cohomological approaches to arbitrage.

topics.name: Automation, Labor Markets & Economic Policy
topics.summary: Empirical and theoretical studies of technological displacement, worker retraining effectiveness, AI learnability by occupation, and firms' shift toward intangible investment amid automation.

topics.name: Bayesian Optimization & Algorithm Selection
topics.summary: Papers addressing regime-conditioned evaluation and per-instance algorithm selection in black-box optimization, exposing hidden dependencies between budget ratios and algorithm performance rankings.

topics.name: Generative Models & Privacy
topics.summary: Methods for privacy-aware data generation and debiasing in vision-language models, addressing the quality-privacy tradeoff in small-sample regimes and fairness across sensitive attributes.

topics.name: Structural Econometrics & Networks
topics.summary: Papers on scalable structural estimation, networked coordination, decentralized mechanisms, and revealed preference methods for complex economic systems with interdependencies.

topics.name: Neural Networks Theory & Geometry
topics.summary: Theoretical work on attention mechanisms, batch normalization effects, token embedding geometry, Koopman operator liftings, and efficient expert routing in transformer architectures.
